sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17560" key="au)tarkesi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐταρκ-εσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n17560.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sufficiency,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0527.tlg035:5:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Psalm.Solom.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
